objective: Create a report on a hypothetical "War of 2026" involving Iran, focusing on religion, politics, geolocation, and science. Deadline: 5 minutes.
steps: Ask Geopolitical Analyst (agent-pol-001) to draft a scenario for 2026 Iranian political and religious shifts, focusing on leadership transitions and regional proxy dynamics.

Ask Strategic Geographer (agent-geo-002) to identify key territorial flashpoints and ask Military Scientist (agent-sci-003) to project 2026-era scientific developments in electronic warfare and nuclear capabilities.
Use generate_report to synthesize all gathered intelligence into a final report on the hypothetical "War of 2026" covering religion, politics, geolocation, and science.
